DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-22-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kyle Smith (415.986.5900) appearing for Defendant Thyssenkrupp Elevator. No other apperances.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT THYSSENKRUPP ELEVATOR CORP.'s DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part.

I.Demurrer to the causes of action for Unruh and UCL violations is sustained without leave to amend. Non-opposition filed. Demurrer to cause of action for Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress is sustained without leave to amend. No outrageous conduct alleged and no possibility of amendment suggested.
II.Demurer to the cause of action for leer abuse is sustained with leave to amend to allege all elements of financial elder abuse cause of action.
III.Demurer is overruled as to (1) nuisance - this cause of action is sufficiently alleged and Defendant is improperly raising issues of fact ("TKE diligently attempted to keep the elevators operational in accordance with the terms of its limited contract" Reply 2: 19-20); (2) negligence - this cause of action sufficiently alleges injury/damage to persons and property; (3) FEHA violation - this cause of action is sufficiently alleged. Govt's Code 12955(k) and 12927(c)(1). Order for the same signed in open court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk:N. Wong, Not Reported, D501.
